tasks.subject: Task 0: Fix Prisma Client Generation for Tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `npx vitest run` pass all suites by ensuring the Prisma client is generated before tests execute.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npx vitest run` passes all test suites including `game-actions.test.ts`
- [ ] `npm run dev` generates the Prisma client before starting

**Verify:** `npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npx vitest run passes all test suites", "npm run dev generates Prisma client"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Mobile Responsiveness (Team Captain at 375px)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make every screen the team captain touches work on a 375px mobile viewport.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/join/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/play/[teamId]/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/map/MapContainer.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/map/HexGrid.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/map/HexTile.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/game/BuyPanel.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/join/page.tsx", "src/app/play/[teamId]/page.tsx", "src/components/map/MapContainer.tsx", "src/components/map/HexGrid.tsx", "src/components/map/HexTile.tsx", "src/components/game/BuyPanel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "Chrome DevTools at 375x667", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Join page input fits 375px", "Hex map fits viewport", "Tap targets >= 44px", "BuyPanel rows don't overlap", "Inventory 2-col on mobile", "Header doesn't collide"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Facilitator Projector Polish (Responsive Scaling)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the facilitator page readable from across a room using CSS breakpoints at xl/2xl.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/facilitator/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/game/DayTimer.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/game/WeatherDisplay.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/game/DayControls.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/game/Scoreboard.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/facilitator/page.tsx", "src/components/game/DayTimer.tsx", "src/components/game/WeatherDisplay.tsx", "src/components/game/DayControls.tsx", "src/components/game/Scoreboard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "Chrome at 1920x1080 fullscreen", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Day/timer readable from 20ft", "Weather visible at distance", "Team cards readable", "Join URL prominent", "Scoreboard scales", "No breakage at intermediate widths"]}
```
